review_execution.reviewed_input: Provided RP00.P02.M02.S02 implementation summary plus validation summary; Claude tools were disabled with --tools "".

findings.title: Confirm production_ready is gated by the failing rp00 validator and is not independently asserted true for S02
findings.description: Claude noted S02 must not be treated as closed while the five evidence artifacts are absent and rp00:control-plane:validate is failing.
findings.recommendation: Verify production_ready is gated by evidence artifacts and rp00 validation before final closeout.
findings.disposition: The RP00 validator failed before evidence on the five missing S02 evidence files, then this evidence set is written and npm run rp00:control-plane:validate is re-run green before commit. No external commit occurs until the validator gate passes.

findings.title: Verify all eight forbidden operations fail closed
findings.description: Claude asked for explicit coverage of writes, execution, runtime route creation, handoff drafting, human approval bypass, tenant boundary bypass, Hermes bypass, and Claude review bypass.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit negative tests and validator checks for every forbidden flag.
findings.disposition: Added exact forbiddenInputClaims assertion, explicit negative test cases for all eight forbidden flags, and RP00 validator negative cases for all eight flags.

findings.title: Verify the frozen normalized output freezes nested arrays
findings.description: Claude noted shallow Object.freeze would not protect handoff_context_ids or acceptance_gate_ids.
findings.recommendation: Confirm nested arrays are frozen and mutation is rejected.
findings.disposition: The normalizer freezes both canonical arrays. Tests now assert Object.isFrozen and push mutation throws for handoff_context_ids and acceptance_gate_ids; the RP00 validator also checks both arrays are frozen.

findings.title: Verify entrypoint and precheck-source identity are exact-match
findings.description: Claude asked to ensure M01 plan_authoring or wrong-subphase M00 marker cannot cross-wire into S02.
findings.recommendation: Use strict equality and negative tests for M01 entrypoint and wrong precheck markers.
findings.disposition: The normalizer checks exact ai_implementation_handoff entrypoint through M00 S03 result assertion. Tests and RP00 validator now reject plan_authoring, wrong request_normalization_ref, and wrong tenant_boundary_precheck_subphase_id.

findings.title: Verify S02 completion gates require all five evidence artifacts plus a green rp00 validator
findings.description: Claude asked to confirm closeout cannot proceed with partial evidence.
findings.recommendation: Confirm packet, command evidence, Claude review, adjudication, construction inspection, and rp00 validation all gate closeout.
findings.disposition: The RP00 validator requires packet.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json for the current S02 closeout and requires H00 command evidence including rp00:control-plane:validate and spec:requirements:validate.

findings.title: Make precheck-scope reliance explicit
findings.description: Claude noted S02 relies on phase-level M00 S03 while module-level precheck is deferred to S03.
findings.disposition: Policy, contract definition, fixture, tests, and construction inspection explicitly record M00 S03 dependency plus S03/S04/S05/S06 precheck deferrals.

findings.title: no_real_data and writes_product_state are structural declarations at this layer
findings.description: Claude noted S02 is not runtime payload content inspection.
findings.recommendation: Record boundary for downstream runtime layers.
findings.disposition: S02 remains a metadata-only no-runtime normalizer. Later runtime or payload-bearing subphases must enforce content-level checks if real payloads appear.

findings.title: S01 canonical-ID coupling should retain a drift guard
findings.description: Claude noted S02 copies context and gate IDs from S01.
findings.recommendation: Keep pinned S01 refs and parity fixture.
findings.disposition: S02 keeps service_entrypoint_contract_ref RP00.P02.M02.S01 and fixture/test/validator parity checks against canonical S01 arrays.

parsed_review.summary: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS from a read-only tools-disabled review. The closeout blockers were evidence absence and explicit verification items. P1 is resolved by the evidence-gated RP00 validator. P2 items were fixed with explicit negative tests, frozen nested array checks, wrong-marker rejection, and closeout evidence requirements.
parsed_review.residual_risk: Low after post-review fixes and final validation. S02 remains metadata-only, no-write, no-runtime, no-service-execution, no implementation handoff drafting, no Hermes or Claude bypass, and no human approval bypass.
